features.name: static variable inside function
features.description: Code should include a static variable declared inside a function without explicit lifetime specification

features.name: static function with implicit automatic variable
features.description: Code should include a static function containing a variable declared without explicit lifetime that should default to automatic

features.name: static function call in parameter initialization
features.description: Code should include a static function call used as the initializer for a parameter

features.name: reference to static variable from outer scope after task hoisting
features.description: Code should include a reference to a static variable from a context outside the original function after static variable hoisting

features.name: for loop variable in static function
features.description: Code should include a for loop with its iterator variable declared inside a static function
